{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260324112955FAA7094BB8962EA15369"}"},"total":1678},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7216198499178906401","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"熬夜追到更新处，看完立马来评论，虽然多书合一现在也很多，但是作者大大这个文真是在我的萌点上跳跃，超喜欢这种节奏的，我是真接受不了那种拖沓几百章还在忍辱负重憋大招复仇那种，女主的性格真是太爱了，三观正，不是为了任务就没有底线，也不会死板的走剧情，特别是和某棠男主的极限拉扯真是笑晕了～～总一句我超喜欢～～加油"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1680152264,"group_id":"7187424126519217184","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NwhJccu6thHYKCYyy5OLiURnPLRZs2hAABQIcFIOzKlJ","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776875250&x-signature=oRrJGA6Uz5DR%2BfCISt8M%2BfcegOI%3D","user_id":"3413326762094904","user_name":"爱吃茄子老鸭汤的萧栾"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3413326762094904","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7187424126519217184","book_info":{"abstract":"〔女强+穿书+系统+救赎+病娇+沙雕+娱乐圈+豪门+雄竞+修罗场〕
57章之后，第四本书主角登场，开始刺激
　　作为快穿局优秀员工，乔锦接了一个试验任务，要求她同时穿入四本书里，为主角最后的完美结局添砖加瓦。
　　于是，作为恶毒继姐的她，目标是压榨病娇校霸继弟，让继弟成功黑化，养娃高手乔锦邪魅一笑：“这我熟啊。”
　　当天立即下单数本高考资料，将厚重的紫色辅导书摔在继弟面前，“考不上年级第一，有你好看。”
　　同时作为影帝男主怨种前女友的她，需要教会男主自力更生的道理，著名教育家乔锦表示“小事一桩”。
　　在综艺上打脸虐渣，在事业上一路长虹，就算成为霸道总裁文里的炮灰未婚妻，也没关系。
　　文里女主和男主纠缠十多年，经历怀孕、流产、换肾、绑架等各种大事都没在一起。
　　乔锦看的烦，直接一把捞起经济学博士女主就跑。
　　恋爱哪有事业香，girls help girls.
　　#训狗大师乔锦#
　　#穿进玛丽苏文中怎样活成温情故事汇#","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2of852b119ece9171d587a342334cf177b~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"棉羊咩","author_id":"","book_id":"7187424126519217184","book_name":"穿进四本书的修罗场，嗷嗷刺激","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#f0c8c0","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1817人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":267,"name":"现言脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=267&name=现言脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":3,"name":"现代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=3&name=现代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":86,"name":"女强","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=86&name=女强&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":43,"name":"娱乐圈","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=43&name=娱乐圈&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":69,"name":"直播","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=69&name=直播&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":380,"name":"病娇","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=380&name=病娇&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":382,"name":"穿书","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=382&name=穿书&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":457,"name":"虐渣","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=457&name=虐渣&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":473,"name":"豪门世家","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=473&name=豪门世家&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":520,"name":"大佬","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=520&name=大佬&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":522,"name":"打脸","schema":"dragon1967://newCate 其实很多书融合的梗也挺多的，但是这本书真的写的非常有意思，也有自己独特的地方，有新意。作者大大的文笔也很好，女主真的好好。
就喜欢这种书中原女主有自己的独立人格的，感觉女主是来救赎原女主的，好爱[飞吻]女主真的很温柔，三观超正呐，剧情真的让我想不到，特别是第四本书出现，wow，刺激。
